hero.desc: A little lift. A softer shadow under the eyes. Better balance in photos. Dermal fillers can do that, without changing your face.

what.desc: Dermal fillers are gel-like injections placed under the skin to restore volume, soften deeper lines, and shape features naturally.
what.point1: Made with hyaluronic acid (HA) – your body already has it
what.point2: Attracts water for a hydrated, plump look
what.point3: Can support structure or stimulate collagen
what.goal1: I look tired even when I sleep
what.goal2: My cheeks look flatter in photos

fear.desc: How Nexus Clinic KL avoids it and ensures natural results
fear.point1: Treating the right point – support first, not just filling lines
fear.quote: "I don't want to look like I've had work done. I just want to look like me, but refreshed."

process.step1Desc: We analyze your structure, expressions, and goals
process.step2Desc: Mild discomfort, not pain – we ensure your comfort
process.step4Desc: Clear guidance on what to expect

faq.a1: When performed by qualified doctors using approved products, yes.
faq.a2: Typically 6 to 18 months, depending on type and area.
faq.a3: Hyaluronic acid fillers can be dissolved if needed.
faq.a4: Most return to activities immediately, mild effects fade in days.
faq.a5: Mild discomfort – numbing methods ensure comfort.
faq.a6: No perfect age – from late 20s for subtle balance to later for restoration.

cost.advice: Best pricing after facial assessment – pay for a plan, not a package

cta.desc: If you want a refreshed look that still feels like you, book a consultation at Nexus Clinic Kuala Lumpur.
